creator: naylor.b.david@gmail.com
text:
When setting network adaptor to bridged (using device tap0 or brodge0) the machine fails to start with message:

Failed to start the virtual machine WXP.
Failed to open/create the internal network 'HostInterfaceNetworking-tap0' (VERR_SUPDRV_COMPONENT_NOT_FOUND).
Unknown error creating VM (VERR_SUPDRV_COMPONENT_NOT_FOUND).

How-To-Repeat: Create machine with a bridged network adaptor and try run it.
